result:
**Goal: Add a "pattern search" feature that detects and highlights known patterns (still lifes, oscillators, spaceships) within the running simulation.**

This would analyze the live grid to identify and label recognizable structures — gliders in flight, blinkers oscillating, blocks sitting still, etc. — drawing bounding boxes or color-coding them with their names. The project already has a pattern library and sophisticated rendering; this is the natural next evolution from "place patterns" to "recognize patterns in the wild."
